title: NASA Artemis Program
description: A NASA source card about Artemis, Moon exploration, technology, and human spaceflight.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Artemis resources introduce current Moon exploration goals, spacecraft, rockets, lunar science, habitats, spacesuits, and plans for long-term exploration.
Use this source for nonfiction reading about engineering constraints, mission planning, public investment, and scientific goals.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
